utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: hi , alexander . how are you ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: i'm doing really well . thank you .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , i know the nurse told you a little bit about dax . i'd like to tell dax about you . okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: sure .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , alexander is a 62-year-old male , with a past medical history significant for reflux , who presents for follow-up of his chronic problems .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , alexander , what's being going on ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: well , i am so thankful you put me on that medicine for my , my reflux .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: the protonix ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: the protonix . that , i had , w- made an amazing change in my life .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: yeah .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: i'm really comfortable now . i eat whatever i want , and i feel so much better .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay , great . i'm glad to hear that . i know you were having a lot of discomfort there before , so that's good . okay . and how are you doing , kind of , managing your diet ? i know , you know , you have to do some lifestyle modifications , like cutting back on caffeine and spicy foods and alcohol . how are you doing with that ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: i'm doing really well . i moved over from caffeine , over to green tea .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: and it , it is so , m- it does n't cause as much problem as it did with , when i was drinking so many energy drinks a day .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right . good . i'm glad to hear that . great . all right .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , i think getting that , rid of that reflux , really helped my attitude improve .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , my job's going great . everything's phenomenal right now .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . and you have a , a good support system at home ? i know you have a big-

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yeah .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: . family .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yes . yes . all my kids-

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: . call and check on me every day .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . great . i'm glad to hear that . now , i know you did a review of systems sheet when you checked in .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yes .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: i , are you having any symptoms ? any chest pain , shortness of breath , belly pain , of , nausea or vomiting ? anything like that ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: no . no symptoms at all .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay , great . um , well , let me go ahead . i wan na do a quick physical exam .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: hey , dragon . show me the vital signs .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , your vital signs here in the office look really good . so , you're doing a great job managing your , your blood pressure . your heart rate's nice and low . i'm gon na go ahead and take a listen to your heart and lungs .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: and i'll let you know what i find . okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . good . all right . so , on physical examination , i , i do n't hear any carotid bruits in your neck , which is really good . you know , your heart exam , i do hear a slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur , which i've heard in the past , so that's stable . uh , your lungs are nice and clear , and you do have , you know , 1+ pitting edema bilaterally in your lower extremities .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , what does that mean ? you know , i , i think , you know , you're doing a ... it sounds like a doing a good job watching your diet . you could ... you just are retaining a little bit of fluid , maybe just from standing all day .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay ? let's take a look at some of your results . okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: hey , dragon . show me the endoscope results .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: so , this was the endoscopy that you had last year when you were having all that pain . it just showed that you had had some mild gastritis . so , it's good to hear that that , you know , protonix is helping you a lot . okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: i'll do a little more exercise too .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: that sounds great . all right . so , let's talk just a little bit about , you know , my assessment and my plan for you .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: for your reflux , i want you to continue on the protonix 40 mg a day , and continue with those lifestyle modifications with the dietary stuff-

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: . okay ? do you have any questions ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: no questions .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . all right . well , the nurse is gon na come in soon , and she's gon na check you , get you checked out . okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay . thank you .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: hey , dragon . finalize the note .

detail_list.summary: The patient is a 62-year-old male with a history of reflux presenting for follow-up of chronic problems.
The doctor asks the patient about his current status.
The doctor asks if the patient is referring to Protonix.
The patient confirms Protonix has significantly improved his condition.
The doctor asks how the patient is managing his diet and lifestyle modifications.
The patient reports he has switched from energy drinks to green tea.
The patient notes that improved reflux has helped his mood.
The patient reports his job is going well.
The doctor asks if the patient has a good support system at home.
The patient reports his children call to check on him daily.
The doctor asks if the patient is experiencing chest pain, shortness of breath, abdominal pain, nausea, or vomiting.
The doctor notes the patient's vital signs are good.
Physical exam findings include no carotid bruits, a stable 2/6 systolic ejection murmur, clear lungs, and 1+ pitting edema in the lower extremities.
The patient's endoscopy from last year showed mild gastritis.
The doctor instructs the patient to continue Protonix 40 mg daily.
The doctor instructs the patient to continue dietary and lifestyle modifications.
The doctor asks if the patient has any questions.
